creator: slm@freebsd.org
text: Can you apply the attached msleep patch (in a tar file)?  This will cause the driver to sleep for 3 seconds if there is an IOC Status in the get_sata_identify function.  You will probably need to rebuild the kernel so that the patched driver will be loaded when you boot.  You should see a message that the driver is sleeping for 3 seconds and then finished sleeping.  This only will happen if the IOC Status is non-zero, as happens in your system.  If you need help with this, let me know.
